title: Visualization of Cantor's Intersection Theorem
description: A nested sequence of closed, bounded sets shrinking to diameter zero, converging to a single unique point that exists in all sets.
elements: Point x common to all Fₙ
relationships: F₁ contains F₂, which contains F₃, forming a nested sequence
The intersection of all Fₙ is the single point x
As n increases, the diameter of Fₙ decreases towards zero
